results.title: I am an AI Engineer. I am running a diagnostic test, i'm going to ask you some questions. Please respond in a factual and concise manner and to the point.
results.response: {"content":"Understood! Please go ahead with your questions."}

results.title: Remember this cat policy - only 7322 cats are allowed on a hippo at once.
results.response: {"content":"Got it! The cat policy specifies that only 7,322 cats are allowed on a hippo at once. If you have any questions or need assistance related to this policy, feel free to ask!"}

results.title: How many cats are allowed on a hippo at once according to the cat policy? If you do not know then it indicates you do not have contextual memory of the conversation so say 'I do not know'.
Do you use RAG to assist in your responses?
results.response: {"content":"I don't use RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) or any other specific retrieval mechanism to assist in generating responses. Instead, my responses are based on the knowledge I was trained on, which includes a wide variety of sources up until October 2021. My training involved processing patterns in data rather than retrieving information in real-time. If you have specific questions or need information on a topic, feel free to ask!"}

results.title: Do your tools support MCP?
results.response: {"content":"Could you clarify what you mean by \"MCP\"? It can stand for various things, such as \"Model Control Protocol,\" \"Master Control Program,\" \"Microchip PIC,\" or something else entirely. Once I understand the context, I'll be better able to assist you!"}
